name: Red Clam Sauce for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in garlic powder, bay leaf, basil, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, and brown sugar.
4. Mix in tomato puree, tomato paste, and white wine.
5. Add canned clams and reserved clam juice to the sauce.
6. Simmer, uncovered, for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in dried parsley just before serving.
8. Cook linguini according to package instructions until hot.
9. Serve linguini topped with the red clam sauce.
